{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Spider Division
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Spider Division]] reported no violations of the [[Way]] near [[Harrow]] or [[Limit]] prior to [[Limit]]'s expiration.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
